---
name: Advisory Board Vote
about: Open an async Advisory Board vote for governance or methodology changes
title: "Advisory Board Vote: "
---

## Decision Summary

Describe the proposal in one paragraph.

## Decision Type

- [ ] New benchmark domain
- [ ] Methodology change
- [ ] Scoring rubric update
- [ ] Scenario retirement or rotation policy
- [ ] Other governance decision

## Why This Needs Board Review

Explain why the proposal is in scope under `governance/CHARTER.md`.

## Proposal Detail

- Owner:
- Decision deadline:
- Requested effective date:
- Related pull requests or docs:

## Conflict Check

- [ ] I confirmed whether any board member has a direct conflict of interest.
- [ ] Any affected member will recuse themselves before voting.

## Voting Instructions

- Quorum requires 3 non-recused members.
- A simple majority of votes cast decides the outcome unless the charter says otherwise.
- Board members should reply with `approve`, `reject`, or `abstain`, plus rationale.

## Public Rationale

Document the expected public rationale that will be copied into meeting minutes or a follow-up note.
